case_title: GASH, LORRAINE N. VS PACIFIC BELL SUB.OF PACIF TELESIS CALIF. CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GASH, LORRAINE N. AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL SUB.OF PACIF TELESIS CALIF. CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GASH, LORRAINE N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL SUB.OF PACIF TELESIS CALIF. CO. $1,267.32 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,282.32, COURT FINDS THAT DEFT IS 25% AT FAULT IN CAUSING THE SUBJECT COLLISION. JUDGMENT ORDERED REPRESENTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
25% OF THE $5069.28 ESTIMATED COST OF REPAIR. PROOF OF SERVICE WIAVED.
INVALID POS. PERSON SERVED NOT INDICATED AS AGENT FOR PERSONAL SERVICE.
